learn.core_idea: Persistence correctness is defined by invariants that must hold after operations complete.
mechanism_steps: Evaluate invariants at end of run.
Treat invariant failure as correctness bug, not performance issue.
learn.worked_example: Run may complete, but fs_ok must also remain true for pass.
pre_challenge_checklist: I can distinguish correctness from speed.
I can inspect trace when invariants fail.
